debug_info.goal:
R : Type u_1
inst✝¹ : DecidableEq R
inst✝ : DivisionRing R
h : Fintype R
Z : Subring R := center R
n : ℕ
H : ∃ x y, x ≠ y
h_n : n ≠ 0
q : ℕ := Fintype.card ↥Z
h_card : Fintype.card R = q ^ n
finclassa : (A : ConjClasses Rˣ) → Fintype ↑A.carrier
this✝² : (A : ConjClasses Rˣ) → Fintype ↑{Quotient.out A}.centralizer
fintypea : ConjClasses Rˣ →
  Fintype
    ↑{A |
        have this := finclassa A;
        Fintype.card ↑A.carrier > 1} :=
  fun A =>
    setFintype
      {A |
        have this := finclassa A;
        Fintype.card ↑A.carrier > 1}
this✝¹ :
  Fintype
    ↑{A |
        have this := finclassa A;
        Fintype.card ↑A.carrier > 1}
S' : Set (ConjClasses Rˣ) := ConjClasses.noncenter Rˣ
this✝ : Fintype ↑S'
S : Finset (ConjClasses Rˣ) := S'.toFinset
n_k : ↑S' → ℕ := sorry
h_R : Fintype.card Rˣ = q ^ n - 1
h_Z : Fintype.card (↥Z)ˣ = q - 1
H1 : q ^ n - 1 = q - 1 + ∑ x ∈ (ConjClasses.noncenter Rˣ).toFinset, x.carrier.toFinset.card
e : ↥(Subgroup.center Rˣ) ≃* (↥(Submonoid.center R))ˣ := Subgroup.centerUnitsEquivUnitsCenter R
f : (↥(Submonoid.center R))ˣ ≃ (↥Z)ˣ := Equiv.inv (↥(Submonoid.center R))ˣ
this : ∀ (A : ↑S'), Fintype.card ↑(↑A).carrier * (q ^ n_k A - 1) = q ^ n - 1
h1 : q ^ n - 1 = q - 1 + ∑ A, (q ^ n - 1) / (q ^ n_k A - 1)
hZ : Nonempty ↥Z
hq_pow_pos : ∀ (m : ℕ), 1 ≤ q ^ m
h_n_k_A_dvd : ∀ (A : ↑S'), n_k A ∣ n
hq : q = Fintype.card ↥(center R)
h₁_dvd : eval (↑q) (phi n) ∣ eval (↑q) (X ^ n - 1)
A : ↑S'
hs : A ∈ univ
⊢ 1 ≠ n_k A

failed_attempts:
intro h
        have h_card_cent := (VectorSpace.card_fintype Z (Subring.centralizer {Quotient.out A})).choose_spec
        rw [h, pow_one] at h_card_cent
        have h_le : Z ≤ Subring.centralizer {Quotient.out A} :=
          Subring.center_le_centralizer {Quotient.out A}
        have h_eq := Subring.eq_of_le_of_card_eq h_le h_card_cent.symm
        have h_mem : Quotient.out A ∈ Z := by
          rw [h_eq]
          exact Subring.mem_centralizer_self
        have h_noncenter := A.2
        simp [ConjClasses.mem_noncenter, center_toSubsemiring, Subsemiring.center_toSubmonoid] at h_noncenter
        exact h_noncenter h_mem
      have h_lt : n_k A < n := by
        refine Nat.lt_of_le_of_ne (Nat.le_of_dvd (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero h_n) (h_n_k_A_dvd A)) ?_
        intro h_eq
        have h_card := this A
        rw [h_eq] at h_card
        simp only [mul_eq_zero, Fintype.card_eq_zero, ConjClasses.carrier_eq_empty, or_false,
          tsub_eq_zero_iff_le, pow_le_pow_iff_right₀ (Fintype.card_pos (α := Z))] at h_card
        exact (not_le_of_gt (fintypea A).card_pos) h_card
      rw [mul_comm]
      exact eval_dvd (phi_div_2 n (n_k A) (h_n_k_A_dvd A) h_lt)
    rw [h1] at h₁_dvd
    simp only [Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_sub, Nat.cast_one, Nat.cast_sum,
      Nat.cast_div (Nat.dvd_sub_pow_of_dvd_sub (h_n_k_A_dvd _) (by simp))] at h₁_dvd
    rw [dvd_add_right h₂_dvd] at h₁_dvd
    exact h₁_dvd
  have h_phi_abs_le_q_sub_one : |(phi n).eval (q : ℤ)| ≤ q - 1 := by
    gcongr
    apply le_abs_of_dvd
    · linarith [Fintype.card_pos (α := Z)]
    · exact h_phi_dvd_q_sub_one
  have h_q_sub_one_lt_phi_abs : q - 1 < |(phi n).eval (q : ℤ)| := by
    have h_prod : (phi n).eval (q : ℤ) = ∏ lamb in primitiveRoots n ℂ, (q - lamb) := by
      rw [phi, cyclotomic_eq_prod_X_sub_primitiveRoots (fun n _ ↦ n) n h_n, eval_prod]
      simp only [eval_sub, eval_X, eval_C]
      norm_cast
    have h_abs_prod : |(phi n).eval (q : ℤ)| = ∏ lamb in primitiveRoots n ℂ, ‖(q : ℂ) - lamb‖ := by
      rw [h_prod, Complex.abs_prod]
      apply Finset.prod_congr rfl
      intro lamb _
      rw [Complex.norm_eq_abs]
    rw [h_abs_prod]
    have h_gt_one : ∀ lamb ∈ primitiveRoots n ℂ, 1 < ‖(q : ℂ) - lamb‖ := by
      intro lamb hlamb
      have := h_lamb_gt_q_sub_one q n lamb hlamb
      rw [← sq_lt_sq, Real.sq_sqrt (by nlinarith [norm_nonneg ((X - C lamb).eval (q : ℂ))])] at this
      simp only [eval_sub, eval_X, eval_C] at this
      exact lt_of_lt_of_le (by nlinarith) (le_of_lt this)
    calc
      (q : ℝ) - 1 < (q : ℝ) - 1 ^ (primitiveRoots n ℂ).card := by
        nth_rewrite 1 [← pow_one ((q : ℝ) - 1)]
        gcongr
        · linarith [Fintype.card_pos (α := Z)]
        · exact Nat.one_lt_card_primitiveRoots h_n
      _ = ∏ _ in primitiveRoots n ℂ, ((q : ℝ) - 1) := by
         rw [Finset.prod_const, Finset.card_attach]
      _ < ∏ lamb in primitiveRoots n ℂ, ‖(q : ℂ) - lamb‖ := by
         refine Finset.prod_lt_prod_of_nonneg (by intros; linarith [Fintype.card_pos (α := Z)]) ?_
         · intro lamb hlamb
           exact le_of_lt (h_gt_one lamb hlamb)
         · obtain ⟨lamb, hlamb⟩ := (primitiveRoots n ℂ).exists_mem_of_ne_zero (by exact_mod_cast h_n)
           use lamb
           exact ⟨hlamb, h_gt_one lamb hlamb⟩
  linarith
